characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot. Features a glossy white synthetic casing with visible mechanical joints at the neck and shoulders. She has a perfectly symmetrical face with striking blue eyes and subtle, makeup-like contours.
characters.wardrobe: White robotic casing/armor, no traditional clothing.
characters.demeanor: Calm, polite, slightly stiff and uncanny.

characters.appearance: Young adult human male with a slim build and medium brown complexion. He has short, dark, slightly wavy hair and a clean-shaven face.
characters.demeanor: Casual, slightly hesitant but eager to learn.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Hello, what is your name? [Hello, what is your name?]

Character B says: My name is Rahul. [My name is Rahul.]

Character A says: How old are you? [How old are you?]

Character B says: I have 22. [I have 22.]

Character A says: 'I have 22' नहीं, 'I am 22 years old' होता है। ['I have 22' is incorrect, it is 'I am 22 years old'.]

Character B says: Okay okay, I am 22 years old. [Okay okay, I am 22 years old.]

Character A says: Where are you from? [Where are you from?]

Character B says: I am Uttar Pradesh. [I am Uttar Pradesh.]

Character A says: 'I am Uttar Pradesh' नहीं, 'I am from Uttar Pradesh' होगा। ['I am Uttar Pradesh' is incorrect, it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by demonstrating a realistic, interactive AI conversation.
- Shows the app correcting common Indian-English grammatical mistakes in real-time.
- Establishes a non-judgmental, helpful tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
HELLO WHAT IS YOUR NAME?
MY NAME IS RAHUL
HOW OLD ARE YOU?
I have 22
I have 22 नहीं (nahi)
I am 22 yrs old होता है (hota hai)
OKAY OKAY I AM 22 YEARS OLD
WHERE ARE YOU FROM?
I am Uttar Pradesh
I am Uttar Pradesh नहीं (nahi)
I am from Uttar Pradesh होगा (hoga)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: ओहो ठीक है ठीक है, मुझे इंग्लिश बोलने में बहुत hesitation होती है। [Oh okay okay, I feel a lot of hesitation in speaking English.]

Character A says: कोई प्रॉब्लम नहीं, Supernova का AI tutor ट्राई किया? [No problem, have you tried Supernova's AI tutor?]

Character B says: वो तो बहुत महंगा होगा ना? [That must be very expensive, right?]

Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं, ये बहुत affordable है और आप real-world situations की practice कर सकते हो। [Not at all, it is very affordable and you can practice real-world situations.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Learner admits their core pain point (hesitation in speaking).
- Introduces Supernova as the solution.
- Addresses the cost objection by framing it as affordable, removing the competitor's specific '7X cheaper' claim.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
OH THEEK HAI THEEK HAI
MUJHE ENGLISH BOLNE MEIN HESITATION HOTI HAI
KOI PROBLEM NAHI
SUPERNOVA AI TUTOR TRY KIYA?
WO TOH MAHENGA HOGA NA?
BILKUL NAHI
BAHUT AFFORDABLE HAI
REAL-WORLD PRACTICE

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसलिए लाखों लोग Supernova पर रोज़ इंग्लिश बोलने की प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [That's why lakhs of people are practicing speaking English daily on Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Builds social proof by mentioning a large user base.
- Visually reinforces the app name and download action with an overlay.
- Swaps the competitor's specific '50 lakh' claim to a more brand-safe 'lakhs of people'.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
ISLIYE LAKHON LOG
SUPERNOVA PAR ENGLISH PRACTICE KAR RAHE HAIN
Supernova AI English Speaking...
Install
English Speaking App - Improve Your Spoken English and Fluency with AI Support

scenes.scene_label: Time Constraint and Call to Action
scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: पर जॉब के साथ टाइम कहाँ मिलता है? [But where is the time along with a job?]

Character A says: रोज़ की सिर्फ 15 मिनट की प्रैक्टिस काफी है। आप इंटरव्यू और ऑफिस में बिल्कुल confident हो जाओगे। [Just 15 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident in interviews and the office.]

Character B says: वाओ, कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?]

Character A says: नीचे install बटन दबाओ और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। आज ही अपनी इंग्लिश जर्नी शुरू करो! [Press the install button below and download the Supernova app. Start your English journey today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses the 'lack of time' objection for working professionals.
- Highlights practical benefits (confidence in interviews/office) instead of a gimmicky '15-day guarantee'.
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
PAR JOB KE SAATH TIME KAHAN MILTA HAI
ROZ KI SIRF 15 MINUTE KI PRACTICE KAAFI HAI
INTERVIEW MEIN CONFIDENT HO JAOGE
WOW KAISE JOIN KARU?
NEECHE INSTALL BUTTON DABAO
AUR SUPERNOVA APP DOWNLOAD KARO
AAJ HI APNI ENGLISH JOURNEY SHURU KARO

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: अभी install पे क्लिक करो और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Final visual and auditory push to download the app.
- Displays the brand logo and a clear 'Install Now' button.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
English speaking app
Install Now
